channel.title: 《是大臣》 on 天漢帝國復興錄
channel.description: Recent content in 《是大臣》 on 天漢帝國復興錄

item.title: 英劇《是大臣》對中國未來制度建設的啟示
item.description: Series 1 Open Government The Official Visit The Economy Drive Big Brother The Writing on the Wall The Right to Know Jobs for the Boys Series 2 The Compassionate Society Doing the Honours The Death List The Greasy Pole The Devil You Know The Quality of Life A Question of Loyalty Series 3 Equal Opportunities The Challenge The Skeleton in the Cupboard The Moral Dimension The Bed of Nails The
